seo.title: Vue (general) implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Vue (general) projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for validating Vue 3 applications before production deployment, focusing on performance, type safety, and state management integrity.

items.title: Route-based Code Splitting
items.description: Verify all non-initial routes in the Vue Router configuration use dynamic imports to reduce the main bundle size.

items.title: Tree-shaking Verification
items.description: Run a production build and use a bundle visualizer to ensure that unused components and heavy libraries are not included in the final assets.

items.title: Async Component Implementation
items.description: Wrap heavy third-party components (e.g., charts, editors) in 'defineAsyncComponent' to defer loading until they are rendered.

items.title: Image and Asset Optimization
items.description: Configure Vite plugins to compress static assets and ensure responsive image sets are used for high-resolution displays.

items.title: Prefetching Strategy
items.description: Implement link prefetching for high-probability navigation paths using the browser's idle time.

items.title: Build-time Type Checking
items.description: Integrate 'vue-tsc --noEmit' into the CI/CD pipeline to catch template-level type errors that 'tsc' ignores.

items.title: Prop and Emit Typing
items.description: Ensure all components use generic 'defineProps' and 'defineEmits' interfaces rather than runtime-only declarations.

items.title: Template Ref Typing
items.description: Verify all DOM and component refs are strictly typed (e.g., ref<HTMLButtonElement | null>(null)) to prevent runtime null pointers.

items.title: Strict Mode Configuration
items.description: Enable 'strict: true' and 'noImplicitAny' in tsconfig.json to ensure full coverage across the codebase.

items.title: External Data Typing
items.description: Apply Zod or similar schema validation to API responses before casting them to TypeScript interfaces.

items.title: Reactivity Preservation
items.description: Audit all store usage to ensure 'storeToRefs' is used when destructuring state to avoid losing reactivity.

items.title: Action-based State Updates
items.description: Enforce a pattern where state is only modified through actions to ensure updates are traceable in DevTools.

items.title: Subscription Cleanup
items.description: Manually unsubscribe from store '$subscribe' or '$onAction' listeners in the 'onUnmounted' hook if they are created outside of setup.

items.title: State Reset Logic
items.description: Implement and call a '$reset' method for all user-related stores during the logout flow to prevent data leakage.

items.title: Persisted State Validation
items.description: Verify that any state persisted to LocalStorage is versioned and cleared if the schema changes.

items.title: Global Error Hook
items.description: Configure 'app.config.errorHandler' to pipe runtime errors to a monitoring service like Sentry or LogRocket.

items.title: Component Error Boundaries
items.description: Wrap high-risk components (e.g., third-party widgets) in parent components using the 'onErrorCaptured' hook.

items.title: API Feedback Loops
items.description: Ensure every network request has a corresponding loading state and a user-facing error message for 4xx/5xx responses.

items.title: Watcher Cleanup
items.description: Verify that manually created 'watch' or 'effect' calls have their stop handles invoked to prevent memory leaks.

items.title: Environment Variable Validation
items.description: Confirm that only non-sensitive variables are prefixed with 'VITE_' and that secrets are never committed to the repository.

items.title: Composable Unit Testing
items.description: Verify that business logic extracted into composables has 100% test coverage using Vitest.

items.title: Component Mount Testing
items.description: Test critical UI components using Vue Test Utils to verify correct event emission and prop rendering.

items.title: E2E Critical Path Testing
items.description: Execute Playwright or Cypress tests for the primary user flows (login, checkout, profile updates).

items.title: Accessibility (A11y) Audit
items.description: Run an automated accessibility scanner (e.g., axe-core) to check for missing ARIA labels and low contrast ratios.

items.title: Linting and Formatting
items.description: Run 'eslint --ext .js,.vue' and 'prettier --check' to ensure code consistency and prevent common syntax anti-patterns.
